About.title: Your Trusted Partner in Paradise
About.description: We don't just sell properties. We navigate the complexities of international real estate so you can acquire your dream lifestyle with total peace of mind.
About.p1: Founded on the principles of absolute transparency and elite service, LASS Realty has grown into the Dominican Republic's most reliable luxury real estate boutique.
About.p2: Buying international property requires deep local knowledge and unshakeable trust. Our team holds over 15 years of combined experience exclusively in the Punta Cana, Cap Cana, and Bavaro markets. We understand the legal frameworks, the developer histories, and the neighborhood micro-economies.
About.p3: Whether you are searching for a high-yield investment condo or a sweeping oceanfront estate, our commitment remains the same: protecting your capital and delivering a frictionless acquisition experience.
About.legalSecurityDesc: We partner with top local attorneys for Title validation.
About.marketInsightDesc: Exclusive access to off-market luxury pockets.
About.recognized: Recognized as a Top 10 Luxury Brokerage in the Dominican Republic (2025).
About.vettedDesc: We reject 40% of the properties we review. We only list homes with pristine legal standing.
About.endToEndDesc: From viewing to closing to property management, we handle the entire lifecycle.
About.expertsDesc: Specializing in US, Canadian, and European investors buying in the DR.

BuyingGuide.title: A Guide to Buying in the Dominican Republic
BuyingGuide.subtitle: Everything you need to know about purchasing luxury real estate in Punta Cana and beyond as a foreigner.
BuyingGuide.step1Desc: Browse our handpicked portfolio of luxury villas, condos, and estates.
BuyingGuide.step2Desc: We negotiate the best possible price and terms on your behalf.
BuyingGuide.step3Desc: Our partner attorneys ensure the title is clean and taxes are paid.
BuyingGuide.step4Desc: Sign the contract and submit a 10% deposit into escrow.
BuyingGuide.step5Desc: Transfer the final funds and receive your title. Congratulations!
BuyingGuide.faq1Q: Can foreigners own property in the Dominican Republic?
BuyingGuide.faq1A: Yes! Foreigners enjoy the exact same property rights as Dominican citizens. There are no restrictions.
BuyingGuide.faq2A: Closing costs are generally around 3% of the property value, which includes a 3% transfer tax and minor notary fees.
BuyingGuide.faq3A: CONFOTUR is a tax incentive law that exempts qualifying new developments from the 3% transfer tax and gives 15 years of property tax (IPI) exemption.
BuyingGuide.ctaDesc: Reach out to our agents for a personalized consultation.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it—listen to the families and investors we've helped.

t1.quote: LASS Realty made our dream of owning a villa in Punta Cana a reality. Their team handled the entire legal and closing process seamlessly. Unmatched professionalism.

t2.quote: We were nervous about buying property overseas, but the agent was incredibly transparent and held our hand through every step. Highly recommended!

t3.quote: The property management post-sale has been phenomenal. Our luxury condo in Bavaro is consistently rented out when we aren't using it.

MarketReports.pageSubtitle: Download free Punta Cana real estate market reports. Trends, rental yields, and guides for foreign buyers.
MarketReports.r1Desc: Comprehensive analysis of property values, appreciation rates (8.4% CAGR), tourism growth (12M+ visitors), and investment hotspots across the Punta Cana corridor.
MarketReports.r2Title: Foreign Buyer's Guide to Dominican Republic Real Estate
MarketReports.r2Desc: Everything you need to know: Law 16-95 ownership rights, CONFOTUR tax incentives, financing options, closing costs (4.5-7%), and step-by-step buying process.
MarketReports.r3Title: ROI by Neighborhood: Rental Yield Report
MarketReports.r3Desc: Detailed comparison of net rental yields across 5 key neighborhoods: Bávaro (9-11%), Cap Cana (7-9%), Cana Bay (8-10%), Downtown (6-8%), and Vista Cana (6-7%).

Legal.termsDesc: Terms and conditions for using the LASS Realty website.
Legal.privacyDesc: LASS Realty privacy policy. How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.s1_p: By accessing and using the LASS Realty website (lasspuntacana.com), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use our website.
Terms.s2_p: LASS Realty provides an online platform for browsing luxury real estate properties in Punta Cana, Dominican Republic. Our services include:
Terms.s2_l1: Property listings for sale and rent
Terms.s2_l3: Connection with qualified real estate agents
Terms.s3_p: We strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information about all listed properties. However:
Terms.s3_l1: Prices, availability, and details are subject to change without notice
Terms.s3_l2: Photographs may not reflect the current condition of the property
Terms.s3_l4: Estimated rental yields are indicative and not guaranteed
Terms.s4_p: By using our website, you agree to:
Terms.s4_l1: Provide truthful information when completing forms
Terms.s4_l2: Not use the site for illegal or fraudulent purposes
Terms.s4_l3: Not copy, reproduce, or redistribute content without authorization
Terms.s4_l4: Not attempt to access restricted areas of the site
Terms.s5_p: All content on the LASS Realty website, including text, photographs, logos, graphics, and design, is protected by intellectual property laws. LASS Realty and its licensors own all intellectual property rights in the site.
Terms.s6_p: LASS Realty acts as an intermediary and information facilitator. We are not liable for:
Terms.s6_l1: Investment decisions based on site information
Terms.s6_l2: The condition or state of listed properties
Terms.s7_p: These terms are governed by the laws of the Dominican Republic. Any dispute arising from or in connection with these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts of the Dominican Republic.
Terms.s8_p: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will take effect immediately upon publication on the website. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes your acceptance of the modified terms.
Terms.s9_p: For questions about these terms of service, contact us:

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.s1_p: LASS Realty ("we", "our", "us") collects information you voluntarily provide when using our website, including:
Privacy.s1_l1: Full name and email address (contact forms, report downloads)
Privacy.s1_l4: Browsing data and cookies (see Cookies section)
Privacy.s2_l5: Improve our services and website content
Privacy.s3_p: We implement industry-standard security measures including SSL/TLS encryption, secure authentication, and encrypted data storage. Your personal information is never sold to third parties.
Privacy.s4_p: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience. This includes:
Privacy.s4_l1: Required for site functionality (language, currency preferences)
Privacy.s4_l2: Google Analytics 4 for anonymous traffic analysis
Privacy.s4_l3: Improve loading speed and user experience
Privacy.s4_p2: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings.
Privacy.s5_p: We use the following third-party services that may collect data according to their own privacy policies:
Privacy.s6_p: In accordance with Dominican Republic Data Protection Law 172-13 and applicable international regulations, you have the right to:
Privacy.s6_l1: Access the personal data we hold about you
Privacy.s6_l4: Withdraw your consent at any time
Privacy.s7_p: For questions about this privacy policy or to exercise your data rights, contact us:
